title: 42 Sheets 120 to 3000 Grit Assorted Sandpaper, Wet and Dry Sanding Paper Sheets for Wood Furniture Finishing, Metal Sanding, Automotive Polishing, Home Improvement, Decorating
features: 【Package Includes】Sandpaper includes 14 types: 120/150/180/240/320/400/600/800/1000/1200/1500/2000/2500/3000 grit, each grit 3 sheets, total 42 sheets. Size: 9 x 3.6 inches, can be cut into any smaller size you need easily. Sandpaper granule thickness are printed on the back for easy identification

【Premium Quality Sand Paper】This set of sandpaper made of high quality silicon carbide material, after electroplating treatment, the sand distribution is uniform, will not break and fall off when used, long service life.

【Wet & Dry Use】Waterproof sandpaper sheets can be used not only for cars, plastic and more, but also can be used with water, varnish, shellac, lacquer, or oil, which can satisfy almost all your polishing requirements.
【Easy to Use】Sandpaper size 9 × 3.6 inches, both manual polishing and place on sanding block are easily. You can also cut these sandpaper to any size and shape on your demand.

【Wide Applications】Combination sandpaper in various thickens is ideal for artisans and DIY enthusiasts, for polishing, sanding, removing surface scratches or repairing objects on rough surfaces such as fine arts, crafts, crafts, wood, metal, plaster, stone, automotive, glass, lacquer, metal, plastic, etc.
description: Product Description Emery Sandpaper for Polishing and Sanding of Automobiles, Wooden Furniture, Stone, Varnish, Metal, Glass Sandpaper Feature: Wet and Dry Sandpapers are widely applied in sanding, polishing, finishing, grinding, buffing. 14 types of grit: 120/150/180/240/400/600/800/1000/1200/1500/2000/2500/3000(2/3 sheets for each grit). Total 12/42 sheets with various option. Meet all you sanding needs. The sanding paper can be cut into any shape or small size The sanding paper can be used for both wet and dry purpose Wet and dry use: Sandpaper for sanding can be used dry or wet. If the sandpaper is too fine, you can add water and use it to reduce clogging and extend the life of the abrasive. Wide application: widely used in grinding motor vehicles, polishing wooden furniture, turning wood, polishing metal, plastics, handicrafts, and other fields, which can improve your work efficiency.
